examples: But forced austerity has triggered big drops in national outputs, so the debt burdens become even more unsupportable.
A court is not bound to credit bald assertions, unsupportable conclusions, and opprobrious epithets woven into the fabric of the complaint.
Not only is this ethically unsupportable, but ultimately, it is also financially unworkable.
Allied agreement to such a deferral will make it extremely difficult to deploy a replacement before Lance becomes utterly unsupportable.
Bush couldn't fathom Olmert's fervent, if rationally unsupportable belief that if Israel gives Syria the Golan Heights, Syria will happily abandon its best friend and overlord in Teheran.
